── Bun riscv64 build attempt: NOT ATTEMPTED ────────────────────────

Date: 2026-05-19
Operator: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) agent
Host: x86_64 Linux, /dev/nvme0n1p2 (97% used, 62 GB free)

Reason: insufficient disk space.

A real cross-build of Bun riscv64-linux-musl requires (approximate):

  Component                      | Disk
  ──────────────────────────────┼────────
  Bun source clone               | ~600 MB
  WebKit source clone (shallow)  | ~1.5 GB
  WebKit build cache             | ~25 GB
  Bun build cache                | ~8 GB
  Cargo deps + target/           | ~6 GB
  Docker image (debian + LLVM 21 + Rust nightly + Zig + sysroot) | ~12 GB
  Output zip + intermediates     | ~500 MB
  ──────────────────────────────┼────────
  Total                          | ~53 GB

Hard floor: ~50 GB free for the operation to complete with margin. The
host has 62 GB free, but the build also has to keep ccache,
intermediate object files, and ninja's mtime db simultaneously
resident; sub-30 GB of headroom historically causes the WebKit JSC
link step to OOM the filesystem.

What WAS done instead:

  1. Authored all 7 Bun patches under bun-patches/, verified each
     applies cleanly to a fresh `oven-sh/bun @ bun-v1.3.13` checkout
     via `git apply --check` (validation report at
     dist/validate-report.txt).
  2. Authored the recipe + inline WebKit patches under
     webkit-patches/ (recipes for the LLInt + Baseline JIT cherry-pick
     chain; 0003 inline patch for DFG/FTL OFF).
  3. Recorded all upstream SHAs in bun-version.json:patch_series and
     webkit.cherry_pick_targets.
  4. Wrote validate.sh which runs `git apply --check` per patch
     without doing a real build. validate.sh PASSES for all 7 Bun
     patches against bun-v1.3.13 as of 2026-05-19.

When a real build is attempted:

  - Use a host with ≥ 60 GB free disk on the Docker storage volume.
  - Realize the WebKit recipes per webkit-patches/0001-*.recipe before
     running build.sh, OR set BUN_RISCV64_FORCE_CLOOP=1 to skip JIT.
  - Run `./run-build.sh` from this directory.
  - On success: dist/bun-linux-riscv64-musl.zip + .sha256 + build-log.txt
  - On failure: capture the failure in dist/build-failure.txt and the
     full transcript in dist/build-log.txt.

This file gets overwritten by the next real attempt. Until then, it
documents why the artifact is absent.
